title: Axes to Scythes
description: Transform axes ranked stone to netherite into scythes
body:
![title & display of scythes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2993df493c9b4eccb59227ce5e049a2999949adb_0.webp)

### As simple as the title, transform the axes ranked stone to netherite into scythes

The pack has been tested with 1.21.4, and is set to 1.18 versions in the mcmeta, it _should_ work with all 1.18+ versions.

_All textures are based on and colour picked from the original minecraft axe textures. Only changes made are the textures of the axes, some other resource packs are active in the preview images and are not included in this resourcepack_
